class.name: SpineEventData
class.brief_description: Stores the setup pose values for an Event.
class.description: Stores the setup pose values for an Event. Events can have various types of values associated with them including integers, floats, strings, and audio information. The event name is unique within the skeleton.

method.name: get_event_name
method.description: Returns the name of the event, which is unique within the skeleton.

method.name: get_int_value
method.description: Returns the integer value for this event.

method.name: set_int_value
method.description: Sets the integer value for this event.

method.name: get_float_value
method.description: Returns the float value for this event.

method.name: set_float_value
method.description: Sets the float value for this event.

method.name: get_string_value
method.description: Returns the string value for this event.

method.name: set_string_value
method.description: Sets the string value for this event.

method.name: get_audio_path
method.description: Returns the audio path for this event.

method.name: set_audio_path
method.description: Sets the audio path for this event.

method.name: get_volume
method.description: Returns the volume for the audio of this event.

method.name: set_volume
method.description: Sets the volume for the audio of this event.

method.name: get_balance
method.description: Returns the balance for the audio of this event.

method.name: set_balance
method.description: Sets the balance for the audio of this event.
